hotel_name: Khách sạn Hà Nội Gallant (Hanoi Gallant Hotel)

reviews.title: DISGUSTING HOTEL
reviews.text:
Dirty stinky hotel, i had rats in my room
No hot water
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

First of all, we sincerely apologize for your unpleasant experience during your stay with us. We are truly sorry to hear about the issues you encountered.

Regarding the concerns about the unpleasant smell in the room and the lack of hot water, we regret that we did not receive any feedback from you during your stay. We always encourage our guests to inform us immediately of any issues so that we can promptly resolve them and ensure a more comfortable experience.

As for the report of a rat in the room, we are very sorry for the inconvenience caused. We would like to clarify that our hotel maintains strict hygiene and pest control standards, and such incidents are highly unusual. It is possible that leaving the window open may have allowed external factors to affect the room environment.

We truly appreciate your feedback, as it helps us improve our services. Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again and p
reviews.room_type: Superior Double or Twin with Window

reviews.title: Weird stay, weird business practices
reviews.positives: The property was one of the cleaner stays in SEA in terms of overall cleanliness and the toilet. Worth staying for a night only.
reviews.negatives:
Mold hidden behind the bed.

The staff also asked us to cancel our booking.com booking when we arrived at noon if we wanted to check in early and pay them cash. When I said I won’t cancel, they made me sit down in the lobby for 2 hours. This is such a bad business practice to avoid paying commission to booking.com.

Bedsheets were not changed from the old tenants when we checked in and just made to look nice.

They don’t accept card at all even though they say they do, and only let you pay with cash.

reviews.title: Never book this hotel. It’s a SCAM
reviews.text:
This is my worst experience after over 10 years Agoda booking.
Read the reviews carefully if you dont want to be like me.
This hotel is a scam, and many others were the victims.
- They claimed me for in room drink which I never use. When I didnt agree to pay the receiptionist said I’m a liar, and gave me very uneducated words. I found out that others have the same problem with them.
- They claimed me for bedsheets damage which they said because of ironning and smoking. I never ironned on their sheet, while I’m not also crazy to smoke in a small room with my little kids. They said that if I saw the damage while check in I had to report to them immediately. Who the hell can find out a 1cm hole on bedsheet when checking in? This is a SCAM.
- All the staff are very uneducated and behave disrespectful to guest. Read the reviews to see the same problem with others. I reported to the supervisor and she promised to feedback me but no response at all.
Again, never book this hotel or you will be a victim of scam
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Trước hết, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ phản hồi sau thời gian lưu trú, đồng thời thành thật xin lỗi vì trải nghiệm của Quý khách chưa đạt được sự hài lòng như mong đợi.

Tuy nhiên, chúng tôi rất tiếc khi phải làm rõ rằng một số nội dung trong đánh giá của Quý khách là chưa chính xác và chưa phản ánh đầy đủ bản chất sự việc.
Về phản ánh liên quan đến việc tính phí đồ uống trong phòng, trong quá trình kiểm tra phòng sau khi Quý khách trả phòng, khách sạn ghi nhận số lượng đồ uống đã bị thiếu và vỏ sản phẩm đã qua sử dụng được tìm thấy trong thùng rác. Do đó, khách sạn áp dụng tính phí theo đúng quy định đã được thông báo công khai.

Đối với vấn đề ga giường bị hư hỏng, chúng tôi xin khẳng định khách sạn là khách sạn 3 sao, quy trình làm phòng và vệ sinh được thực hiện chuyên nghiệp, kiểm tra kỹ lưỡng trước mỗi lượt nhận phòng. Mặc dù Quý khách cho biết không hút thuốc, tuy nhiên trong quá trình kiểm tra, chúng tôi đã phát hiện

reviews.room_type: Superior Double or Twin with Window

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The place is in good condition, not old.
Great quality and assortment of toiletries, good bath towels, hand towels, and bathrobes.
The bed is very comfortable.
Lots of blankets available.
Both reception and security were very nice and polite.
Special mention to the cleaning staff who very kind and were exceptionally helpful.
reviews.negatives:
No soundproofing.
You can hear neighbors breathing in the bathroom, and people in the hallway.
The room smelled of smoke even though it's advertised as a non-smoking room.
The floor was not very clean.
The window open on an air shaft, no sunlight.

reviews.title: BE CAREFUL. THIS HOTEL IS A SCAM
reviews.text:
This was my worst experience in my hotel booking. Be careful with this hotel:
- They claim you for in-room drink which you never use. If you read the reviews you can see others people have the same issue with them
- They also claimed me for bedsheets damage which they said because of smoking & ironning. I never iron on their sheet and never smoke in room also.
- All the staff are very uneducated. Read the reviews to see many have issue with them.
From my experience and reviews I read after my trip, this is for sure a SCAM

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: It s clean and quiet

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
- The wifi was not working properly. I couldn't do anything with this "constant reconnecting" wifi.
- There was no information provided in the room regarding the available drinks, snacks, or furniture, and no checklist for guests to verify these items. When I checked out, I was unexpectedly charged about $5 for 2 beers, 1 Coke, and 1 instant noodle which I never intended to use. The amount wasn’t a big deal, but the hotel didn’t clarify these charges upfront, which was frustrating.
- The room's door wouldn't lock properly, you can access without any card. Safety was really bad, I had to use my suitcase the block the door.

reviews.title: Manufacturers Manager
reviews.text:
Very unprofessional staffs
S/B 2 * hotel
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

First of all, we sincerely apologize that your stay did not meet your expectations. We are truly sorry that your experience at our hotel was not as pleasant as it should have been.

Your feedback is very important to us and helps us identify areas for improvement in order to enhance our service quality and guest experience.

We truly hope to have another opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with a much better stay.

Kind regards,
Gallant Hotel
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double or Twin - City View

reviews.title: Good value for your money.
reviews.positives: Excellent staff response time. Room is spacious and clean. Hapro and Winmart is 3 minutes away.
reviews.negatives: The bedroom lamp doesn’t work. Bathtub is designed poorly as the water goes around the bathroom to floor. Recommend the room without the bathtub.

reviews.title: Worst hotel in my 40 years experience in hotel accomodations
reviews.text:
1.  Staff ignores the customer 
2. Staff laugh at the customer if there's inquiry 
3. No coordination within internal staff (like the other alteady took a pic of our passports then again the other will adk again)
4. No system monitoring 
5. Staff was rude it does not feel welcome 
6. They will trick you about the freebies in the hotel, you get the bite you got scammed,be careful not to touch even the water
7. Not helpful with customers staff
8. All the pillars as a hotel staff in hotel industry does not meet
9. Not smiling at all until check out time not even talking to the customer 
10. Change your 3 receptionist or the hotel owner will suffer the profit and customers feedback because of your staffs worst behaviour 
11. There were 2 males complaining also what the other guy receptionist did was hold the male customers hand and talk calmly which is unethical, you dont touch like that , be professional
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Trước hết, chúng tôi chân thành xin lỗi vì trải nghiệm của Quý khách trong thời gian lưu trú chưa đạt được sự hài lòng như mong đợi. Chúng tôi luôn trân trọng mọi ý kiến đóng góp để không ngừng cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ.

Liên quan đến phản ánh về thái độ của nhân viên, chúng tôi xin được làm rõ rằng nụ cười của nhân viên xuất phát từ mong muốn thể hiện sự thân thiện và hiếu khách, hoàn toàn không mang bất kỳ hàm ý thiếu tôn trọng hay cười nhạo khách hàng. Chúng tôi khẳng định không có hành vi không phù hợp nào xảy ra, và rất có thể đây là một sự hiểu lầm ngoài mong muốn.

Về việc nhân viên bắt tay với một vị khách khác, tại Việt Nam, đây là một hình thức chào hỏi phổ biến và lịch sự, thể hiện sự tôn trọng và thiện chí trong giao tiếp, đặc biệt khi đối phương thể hiện thái độ thân thiện. Tuy nhiên, chúng tôi cũng ghi nhận rằng sự khác biệt về văn hóa có thể dẫn đến những cảm nhận chưa thoải mái, và sẽ nhắc nhở nhân viên cẩn trọng hơn trong các tình huống tương t

We said...surely ...we booked...so we have priority..over customer who added on the day!!.....A
totally bad experience....
manager ....promised...if we helped her out...she would offer a discount....
laughable....discount is...would knock off price ...from suite room to deluxe room...for first day.....which equals ....no discount...

reviews.title: Des guesthouses meilleures que cet hôtel
reviews.text:
Honnêtement, très mauvaise expérience dans cet hôtel « 3 étoiles ». La literie est très mauvaise, une odeur de cigarette est persistante dans la chambre.
Le room service entre dans la chambre après avoir leur avoir dit non plusieurs fois et cela très tôt le matin.
L’emplacement est vraiment très excentré du centre de Hanoï.
Pour finir, ils nous facturent des bouteilles d’eau alors qu’il nous avait dit qu’elles étaient gratuites.
reviews.response:
Kính chào Quý khách,

Trước hết, Ban Quản Lý khách sạn xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm và đồng thời gửi lời xin lỗi sâu sắc vì những bất tiện Quý khách đã gặp phải trong thời gian lưu trú.

Về chăn ga gối đệm và mùi thuốc lá trong phòng, chúng tôi rất lấy làm tiếc vì sự không thoải mái này. Khách sạn luôn tuân thủ quy trình giặt là và vệ sinh phòng theo tiêu chuẩn, đồng thời áp dụng chính sách không hút thuốc trong phòng. Chúng tôi đã nghiêm túc rà soát lại quy trình kiểm tra phòng và sẽ tăng cường kiểm soát chặt chẽ hơn để tránh tái diễn. Rất mong trong trường hợp tương tự, Quý khách có thể thông báo sớm để chúng tôi kịp thời xử lý hoặc hỗ trợ đổi phòng.

Đối với việc nhân viên phục vụ phòng vào phòng khi Quý khách đã từ chối và vào thời điểm quá sớm, đây là thiếu sót nghiêm trọng trong khâu phục vụ. Chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi và đã chấn chỉnh, nhắc nhở cũng như đào tạo lại nhân viên nhằm đảm bảo tôn trọng tuyệt đối sự riêng tư của khách hàng.

reviews.title: A very disappointing hotel
reviews.text: My search criteria was a hotel near the airport in Hanoi as we had an early flight and knew the airport was not close to the city.  The Gallant Hotel was on the list.  I booked a suite as it was the last night in Vietnam.   Be aware it is not near the airport.  First disappointment.  The checkin staff were uninterested in us.  We were checking out early, walking out the door at the start of breakfast.  When I asked if we could possibly have maybe just pastries or toast.  I didn't even get a reply.  The badly designed shower leaked water creating a flood in the bathroom.  When we said there was no tea/coffee in our room.  We were told they do not have coffee.  A member of the staff did not believe us and came up to the room with us to check if there were tea bags and we had missed them.  It was two tea bags for goodness sake, not the crown jewels!!!!  To save the day the staff member on reception in the morning was very nice. We would not stay here again.

reviews.title: Fake luggage storage !
reviews.text: Ask them to store my luggage, and they just left it in their open office where everyone walk by can see it and access to it!! I was lucky my luggage wasn't stolen by the time i return to the hotel at night!!!
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,

First of all, the hotel would like to sincerely apologize for your less-than-expected experience during your recent stay, especially regarding luggage storage.

We are sorry to have made you feel uneasy. We would like to further explain that the hotel currently does not have a private room or specialized service for luggage storage. The current storage area is a shared storage room where all guests can store their luggage if needed, and the staff always tries to assist in arranging and looking after it to the extent possible.

However, for valuables or items, the hotel does not encourage leaving them behind and always advises guests to keep them themselves to ensure maximum safety.

We thank you very much for your feedback — this is a valuable suggestion for the hotel to review and improve its services in the future. We look forward to having the opportunity to welcome and serve you better during your next stay.

Sincerely,
Gallant Hotel

Vì vậy, khách sạn không chuẩn bị các dụng cụ ăn uống chuyên dụng như thìa. Tuy nhiên, chúng tôi luôn cố gắng hỗ trợ khách hàng trong khả năng có thể, và rất tiếc vì chưa kịp thời mang đến sự thuận tiện cho Quý khách trong tình huống này.

reviews.title: Sobrevalorado, fotos no reales, barrio horrible
reviews.text: Las fotos publicadas están maquilladas. Estuve 4 noches y pasé por 3 habitaciones (podrían haber sido 4) incómodas y todas con problemas. Apenas llegué me ofrecieron un upgrade gratis a una habitación  mas grande con “vista a la ciudad” (vista al edificio del frente en un barrio feo) si ponía reviews positiva en Google, sin siquiera ver la habitación, el recepcionista hizo la gestión en mi celular y envió la foto al jefe como prueba, ahí me entregó la llave. Esta habitación 501 tenía filtración de agua como cascada al piso al usar el lavamanos. La primera mañana  ahí las chicas del aseo querían entrar antes del horario del check out a reponer agua y toallas en la habitación mientras estábamos vistiéndonos y aún insistiendo en abrir la puerta del baño cuando la ducha estaba siendo ocupada. Les dije que dejaría el aviso en la puerta cuando necesitara el aseo.  La segunda habitación 605(último piso) literal me taladraron la cabeza a las 7:50 am, imposible dormir (según dijeron los ruidos provenían de trabajos del vecino) la tercera habitación  206 evidentemente más pequeña que la anterior, cabía solo un velador desencajado del muro y sin espacio para abrir mi maleta.  Se filtraba agua desde el piso de la ducha hasta la puerta del baño. Igual tenia ruidos a las 8:00 am hasta el día domingo (menos fuerte por estar en un piso más bajo). Ya cansada de cambiarme de habitaciones y esperar el horario del nuevo check in, preferí quedarme en esta última por la última noche que me quedaba y  al hacer el check out me cobraron medio día por supuesta toalla manchada con maquillaje que, según ellos, no salía con lavado (me consta que sí sale). No hay opción de desayuno si quieres pagarlo aparte. No hay restaurant. Tienen publicaciones falsas, están más preocupados de los reviews que de dar un buen servicio. Ojo que al parecer varios hoteles de Hanói actúan igual, mejor comprobar en persona las habitaciones. El entorno es feo, si bien está cerca del centro histórico, no es parte old quarter y por todo lo anterior NO recomiendo para nada este hotel.

-Rezeption und sonstige Mitarbeiter sprechen kein Englisch. Kommunikation über Google-Übersetzer schwierig
-Keine Kartenzahlung möglich. Bei Ankunft wird direkt BAR-Zahlung erwartet, obwohl kein Geldautomat in der Nähe
-Zimmer (zur Straßenseite) extrem laut, da die Schiebe-Fenster und Balkontür nicht richtig schließen
-Rauchmelder abmontiert, leere Halterung an der Decke
-Lage nicht zu empfehlen. Auf dem Weg ins Zentrum viele Müll-Feuer am Straßenrand.

reviews.title: In die Jahre gekommenes, aber gutes Hotel mit dem ein oder anderen Manko
reviews.positives: Sauberes Zimmer im westlichen Stil mit Kühlschrank und TV. Die Ablage im Bad bot ausreichend Platz für diverse Pflegeprodukte, Schminke etc. die ich dabei hatte. Aufzug zu den Etagen verfügbar. Dis Lage des Hotels ist gut, viele Dinge sind zu Fuß zu erreichen. Personal spricht nur wenig Englisch, mit Google Übersetzer ließ sich aber gut kommunizieren. Auch eine Barzahlung am nächsten Morgen war ohne Probleme möglich.
reviews.negatives: Das erste Zimmer, was wir bekommen haben, roch penetrant mal stärker, mal weniger stark nach Rauch, besonders abends. Außedem war das Fenster kaputt. Nach Beanstandung war ein Wechsel in ein neues Zimmer jedoch problemlos möglich. Beim neuen Zimmer funktionierte dann leider der Kühlschrank nicht und der Duschabfluss war verstopft. Das Wasser lief ins komplette Badezimmer, was nur sehr kurzes Duschen möglich machte. Wir haben dies aber nicht beanstandet, da wir bei 3 Übernachtungen keine Lust auf einen weiteren Wechsel hatten.

reviews.title: Phòng chưa đạt tiêu chuẩn về sạch sẽ
reviews.text: Tôi đặt phòng cho khách của tôi ở 1 đêm (12-13/6/24), cảm nhận của khách sau khi ở là : khi nhận phòng, vào nhà  vệ sinh , trong bồn tắm có 1vết  ố vàng rất to, nhìn rất phản cảm, khăn tắm cũ, rách te tua, khách k dám sử dụng luôn. Được cái nhân viên có thái độ cầu thị, khi tôi báo  khách  không hài lòng khi chk in, họ cũng nói sẽ sắp xếp để tối đổi phòng  khác cho khách nhưng khách bảo k cần đổi nữa vì cũng chỉ ở qua 1 đêm . Tôi muốn góp ý với ks nếu phòng chưa dọn được sẵn sàng thì không nên cho khách vào nhận phòng vì như vậy khách sẽ có ấn tượng không tốt về chất lượng phòng đó ks cũng cấp

Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We sincerely apologize that your experience did not meet your expectations.

Regarding breakfast, our hotel does offer breakfast service. However, the room rate you booked did not include breakfast. This information is clearly indicated on the booking page when making the reservation. If guests would like to enjoy breakfast, it can certainly be added for an additional fee.

We truly appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the future and provide you with a better experience.

Best regards,
Gallant Hotel Management Team

reviews.title: Not bad but not recommended
reviews.text:
(Vietnamese below)
I stayed here for two nights, and I honestly don’t understand why this hotel has such high and numerous ratings. My experience didn’t quite match the reviews, so I want to share my thoughts honestly:

Pros:
The room looks the same as in the photos. There is a two-way air conditioner (heat and cool), and complimentary drinks are provided (no breakfast). Overall, it’s on par with other standard 3-star hotels.

Cons:
The room has a very unpleasant smell, with a noticeable musty odor as soon as you walk in. The water pressure occasionally becomes weak, and the spring mattress gave me back pain. The service attitude also didn’t feel very warm or enthusiastic. Because of this, I suspect that many of the high ratings might be seeded or inauthentic.

Vietnamese:
Ở đây 2 hôm và tôi không hiểu sao khách sạn này được đánh giá cao và nhiều như thế, tôi cảm thấy không đúng lắm với các review nên chia sẻ thẳng thắn:
Điểm mạnh: phòng như hình, có điều hoà 2 chiều nóng lạnh, đồ uống miễn phí (không ăn sáng) nói chung ngang với các khách sạn 3 sao khác.
Điểm yếu: phòng rất hôi, có mùi ẩm mốc, đi vào thấy mùi rất rõ. Nước thi thoảng yếu, đệm lò xo khiến tôi đau lưng. Thái độ phục vụ có vẻ không được nồng hậu và nhiệt tình cho lắm. Điều đó khiến tôi nghĩ đa số các đánh giá cao là seeding và ảo.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

First of all, on behalf of the hotel, we would like to sincerely apologize and express our regret that your stay did not meet your expectations.

Regarding the musty room smell and weak water pressure:
We truly apologize for this inconvenience. The hotel conducts regular room inspections and system maintenance; however, unexpected issues may occasionally occur. We sincerely wish you had informed us earlier during your stay so our front desk and technical team could have handled the issue promptly or arranged a room change for a better experience.

Regarding staff attitude:
We are very sorry if our staff’s attitude was not warm or welcoming and made you feel uncomfortable. This is certainly not the service standard we aim to provide. Your feedback has been noted for staff review and further training.

Regarding the concern about fake reviews:
We would like to clearly confirm that all reviews on Google Maps, Agoda, and other platforms are from real guests based on the

reviews.positives: Sehr sauber und ordentlich. Das Personal war nett und die Zimmer sehr groß und wie auf den Bildern
reviews.negatives: Die Lage ist okay. Man muss mit einem Grab immer so 10min in die Stadt fahren (dafür aber sehr ruhig).

reviews.title: Poor location
reviews.text: This hotel is overrated. Too far from Old Quarter and attractions. Nothing in neighborhood and walking difficult because of crazy traffic. Some rooms better than others. I ended up getting a raised bath with shower rather than the pictured walk in shower. To the staffs credit they gave me a better room and at least I was comfortable. Restaurant was closed, so no food or room service. Unless you're a local, few food options around hotel.
reviews.response:
Dear Sir,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us.

Our hotel is located in the city center, approximately 3 km from the Old Quarter and major historical attractions. While transportation can be slower during rush hours, it is usually manageable. Regarding dining options, there are many local eateries and restaurants within a 500-meter radius of the hotel. We’re sorry that we didn’t have the opportunity to assist or recommend these options to you during your stay.

As for the bathroom, each of our room categories includes two layouts: one with a bathtub and one with a standing shower. We assign rooms based on guests’ preferences or room availability at the time of check-in.

Concerning the restaurant, please note that it remains open but mainly serves breakfast and operates when there is a sufficient number of guests dining. In cases with only a few guests, breakfast service may be limited.

We sincerely regret that your experience did not fully meet your expectat

The hotel is worry about googles reviews more than give a good staying and fixed the rooms. They made me pay half day extra as a towell was with make up that was washable, but they said it’s not.  (I think was the excuse because I made check out 20 min later at 12:20) Anyway, the old towels doesn’t value half day.  There is no restaurant neither breakfast if you want to extra pay for it, neither any restaurant arround. Please, chek in person before take the rooms, is common in Hanoi the hotels shows pictures completely different to the real conditions. I don’t recommend it

Kính gửi Quý khách hàng,

Cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình tại Gallant Hotel. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng dịch vụ của khách sạn chưa đáp ứng được mong đợi của quý khách. Nhà hàng của khách sạn ở ngay tầng 1,khu vực bên trái sảnh khách sạn.

Chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực mang đến trải nghiệm tốt nhất cho khách hàng, và ý kiến đóng góp của quý khách là rất quan trọng để chúng tôi cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ. Chúng tôi xin lỗi vì những bất tiện mà quý khách đã gặp phải và sẽ rà soát lại vấn đề này với đội ngũ để đảm bảo không tái diễn trong tương lai.

Chúng tôi rất mong có cơ hội được chào đón quý khách lần nữa để có thể mang đến một trải nghiệm tốt hơn. Nếu quý khách có bất kỳ góp ý nào khác, xin vui lòng liên hệ trực tiếp với chúng tôi để chúng tôi có thể hỗ trợ kịp thời.

Trân trọng,
Quản lý Gallant Hotel

reviews.title: Exceptional Value and Service at Gallant Van Don– Highly Recommended!
reviews.text:
My mother and I recently completed a 6-night stay at Gallant Hotel (68 Van Don, Bach Dang, Hanoi), and we were thoroughly impressed with our experience.

The Highlights:

Spacious & Well-Equipped: The hotel is quite grand, and our room was incredibly spacious. It came fully equipped with everything we needed for a comfortable long stay. A great bonus was the complimentary bottled water provided daily.

Outstanding Staff: The service here is top-notch. Two young male receptionists were particularly impressive—not only were they professional and well-presented, but they were also incredibly efficient. Every request I had, from extra water to refilling the shower gel, was handled immediately with a great attitude.

Incredible Value: Given the room size and the level of service, the quality far exceeds the price point. It’s an excellent choice for anyone looking for comfort without breaking the bank.

A Minor Note for Improvement: Out of our 6-night stay, we had only one night where our sleep was disrupted. Around 2:00 AM, a group of Chinese guests returning from their night out were laughing and talking very loudly in the hallway, which woke us up. Additionally, on that same night, the smell of cigarette smoke drifted into our room from the corridor, making it a bit difficult to breathe.

Overall Verdict: Despite that one-time occurrence, our overall experience was very positive. The hotel is clean, the rooms are large, and the staff truly cares about their guests. If you are visiting Hanoi, Gallant 68 is a fantastic option. We would definitely stay here again!

reviews.title: Exceptional staff
reviews.text:
I booked for 2 nights but the first night did not read in their system hence they had no room for me when I arrived at 4am from the airport. The staff arranged for me to stay at a different hotel. it wasn't a good hotel but they took care of the transportation back and forth. 

 The hotel rooms at Hanoi Gallant are humble. Not very modern but still, they are clean. The receptionist is exceptionally hospitable and made sure I had a hassle-free transfer. 

Would like to commend receptionist Quang Dai for his friendliness and helpfulness.  I had the reassurance from him that everything will be taken care of despite the mishap on the first day.

reviews.title: A polite hotel, worth the money.
reviews.text: The hotel is located in a residential area by the Red River, not in a tourist area, so it is very reasonable for experiencing local life. Although the hotel does not serve breakfast, there is a delicious steamed pancake shop next door. Across the street, there is a rice and pho restaurant which is also convenient. A Grab ride to Ba Dinh District in the morning costs only 50-60k. In the afternoon, it may take longer and be a bit more expensive due to traffic. When booking this hotel, prices fluctuate wildly on various apps, so for the best price, it's recommended to check in incognito mode and not log in, as this will show you the lowest price. If you log in or check multiple times, the prices will increase significantly. Especially, do not book through Booking.com, as the prices there are ridiculously high =)))

reviews.text: I usually have short business trips combined with travel to Hanoi. Gallant is the place I choose to rest. It meets my criteria (clean - no cigarette smell - although the soundproofing is not very good) - the staff is very enthusiastic. I will return to Gallant for my upcoming trips ❤️
reviews.response: Kính thưa quý khách hàng, Xin chân thành cảm ơn quý khách hàng đã lựa chọn Khách sạn Gallant làm điểm đến cho chuyến du lịch Hà Nội của mình. Những đánh giá, động viên của bạn sẽ là động lực to lớn giúp chúng tôi nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ của khách sạn. Rất mong được phục vụ bạn sớm trong lần lưu trú tiếp theo!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Excellent place to stay in Ha Noi. Just around 2 km from the real center, but such restaurants with nice food, good price nearby.
reviews.response: Dear customers, We would like to sincerely thank you for choosing Gallant Hotel as your destination for your trip to Hanoi. Your comments and encouragement will be a great motivation for us to improve the quality of our hotel services. We look forward to serving you soon on your next stay!
